pt-br: Monta o contrato de shape completo de treino: idx, targets, hidden e logits.
Mostra o flatten de logits e targets para casar com cross-entropy.
Valida shape, dtype e device para evitar bugs silenciosos.
Confirma que a loss final é escalar.
en-us: Builds the full training shape contract: idx, targets, hidden, and logits.
Shows logits/targets flattening required by cross-entropy.
Validates shape, dtype, and device to prevent silent bugs.
Confirms the final loss is scalar.
